points.text: **Medical Imaging** -- Doctors enhance X-rays and MRIs to spot diseases that would otherwise be invisible to the naked eye
**Social Media Filters** -- Instagram and Snapchat filters are real-time image manipulation: face detection + transformation happening 30 times per second
**The Foundation of Computer Vision** -- Every CV algorithm (facial recognition, object detection, self-driving cars) starts with image manipulation. It's the building block for everything
